heading: Analysis and periodic review of departmental guidance
label: 7929 Analysis and periodic review of departmental guidance

children.text: appropriate approval processes within the Department;
appropriate identification of the agency or office issuing the documents, the activities to which and the persons to whom the documents apply, and the date of issuance;
a publicly available list to identify those significant guidance documents that were issued, revised, or withdrawn within the past year; and
an opportunity for the public to request that an agency modify or rescind an existing significant guidance document.
